compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement _check_rate_limit_error() and sentinel-based throttle override in agent-batch-lifecycle.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add error-reactive rate-limit detection to agent-batch-lifecycle.sh:

1. New function _check_rate_limit_error(result_text):
   - grep -qiE "rate.limit|usage.limit|quota.exceeded" on input
   - On match: write sentinel file ~/.cache/claude/error-reactive-throttle with timestamp
   - Return 0 (match) or 1 (no match)
   - Keywords are quota-specific — bare "429" or "API rate" must NOT match

2. Update cmd_pre_check():
   - Before normal MAX_AGENTS computation, check for sentinel file
   - If sentinel exists and is <5 minutes old: override MAX_AGENTS to 1
   - If sentinel exists but >5 minutes old: remove it (TTL cleanup)

3. New subcommand cmd_check_error() (optional, for orchestrator convenience):
   - Reads result text from stdin
   - Calls _check_rate_limit_error()
   - Outputs CHECK_ERROR: match|no_match

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/agent-batch-lifecycle.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All RED tests from Task 1 pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-lifecycle-error-reactive.sh
- [ ] Quota keywords match, transient 429 does not match
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-lifecycle-error-reactive.sh
- [ ] All existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: Implementation complete. _check_rate_limit_error() added to agent-batch-lifecycle.sh with sentinel-based throttle override in cmd_pre_check(). All 15 error-reactive tests GREEN. All 24 portability tests GREEN. Changes: (1) _RL_SENTINEL variable captures RATE_LIMIT_SENTINEL env var for bash source-prefix compatibility, (2) _check_rate_limit_error() greps rate.limit|usage.limit|quota.exceeded (case-insensitive), writes sentinel with unix timestamp, (3) cmd_pre_check() reads sentinel — fresh (<5min) forces MAX_AGENTS:1, expired (>5min) removes sentinel, (4) cmd_check_error subcommand for orchestrator convenience. Mtime fallback for sentinel files without embedded timestamp.
comments.author: Test
